target:
(This is the second time…
Time has gone back again)

(Am I dead…?
If so, why am I back…?)
(But what was that déjà vu I felt before talking to Mio?)

(The other person's situation also felt strange…
Maybe I'm just exhausted)

Still the same…
Same as two years ago… completely…

Welcome back, Shin-chan!!
Long trip, you're exhausted, aren't you?!

(Stop it, stop it!!
You can hear the voice… the sound of the tide…!!)

(That guy is asking me to…
Protect Mio!!)
(The brake on Mio's bike was tampered with…!)

(I'm too late!
I can't make it…!!!)

(Shit… What the hell am I doing?!
If I had moved faster…!)

Ah, hahaha…
Sorry Shin-chan, I scared you!

Huh?
Ah, I'm totally fine!
I just fell into the sea.

Plus look!
I got a little sweaty… I thought I'd take a swim!

(Almost the same lines as before…
So I really am stuck in a loop…)

Come on up.
I'll help you.

Huh? Yeah…
Why are you asking that?

(Ugh…
I managed to save Mio but…)

This place is pretty deep…
If I stay like this, it'll be bad…

But in the end, you saved me…
I'm embarrassing…

That's not true!
You risked your life to save me!

Anyway, sorry!
I don't know why the brake wouldn't work…

Well, at least you're not hurt.
That's good.

I'm fine.
But I'm completely soaked.

Since it's summer, you'll dry off if you walk…
Let's go home.

(No way…
Déjà vu… this must be what they mean--)

Hey!
You went too fast!!
Brake!!

Ah, hahaha…
Sorry Shin-chan, I scared you!
I got a little sweaty… I thought I'd take a swim!

(When she jumped in earlier…
Her underwear was the same as before)

Mio, what happened to the brake?
Was it broken?

Yeah!
I applied it properly!!
That's strange…
(There's a cut in the brake cable…!?)
(If you pull the brake hard, it would naturally snap!)

(Although she fell into the sea, it could have been a major accident
That could have cost her life!)

(This isn't a prank.
Who in the world did this--)

Shin-chan?
You could at least lend me your hand!
